violations.text: The prep sink in the pastry area was observed with a hand towel dispenser. Hand washing aids must only be at a handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The door to the outside, located downstairs to the dumpster area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The cutting boards of the prep units upstairs are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage tubing near the ice well in the upstairs bar was observed with tape. All non-food contact surfaces must be easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The faucet at the upstairs bar was observed to be in poor repair (faucet not connected). A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The condensate from the espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

1) The floor tiles in the top kitchen area is in poor repair (missing grout). 2) The ceiling tile in the downstairs dry storage area is in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
